# Chinook Web Co.

> Independent web studio based in Calgary, Alberta, building custom websites for local trades businesses — electricians, plumbers, HVAC companies, roofers, and other service-based businesses. We build fast, hand-coded sites that rank in local search and convert visitors into paying customers.

Chinook Web Co. is owned and operated by Denzel Onuoha, founder and web designer. Every project starts with a free, no-obligation homepage mockup so clients see the finished vision before paying a deposit. Sites are hand-coded (no drag-and-drop builders, no bloated themes), launch in 3 to 14 days, and ship with Lighthouse scores of 95 or higher across performance, accessibility, and SEO. Clients own their code outright on completion.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://www.chinookwebco.com/services): Hand-coded, bespoke website builds for Calgary trades and service businesses. No templates, no page builders.
- [Local SEO](https://www.chinookwebco.com/services): Calgary-specific keyword strategy, Google Business Profile optimization, and schema markup built in from day one.
- [Hosting and Maintenance](https://www.chinookwebco.com/services): Premium managed hosting from $149/month, including SSL, CDN, uptime monitoring, software updates, and monthly support hours.

## Pricing

Two fixed-price tiers, no hidden fees.

- The Foundation: $2,500 build fee. 5-page custom site, SEO foundation, Google Business integration, mobile-responsive, live in 3 to 5 days. Hosting and maintenance from $149/month.
- The Growth Engine: $4,800 build fee. 10 pages, advanced local SEO, custom content strategy, conversion rate optimization, analytics setup, live in 7 to 10 days. Hosting and maintenance $299/month.
- Custom projects (e-commerce, booking systems, web applications) are quoted separately.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.chinookwebco.com/): Overview of what Chinook Web Co. does, who it serves, and how the free preview process works.
- [Services](https://www.chinookwebco.com/services): Detailed breakdown of web development, local SEO, and hosting and maintenance offerings.
- [How It Works](https://www.chinookwebco.com/how-it-works): The three-step process — free mockup, client approval, build and launch.
- [Pricing](https://www.chinookwebco.com/#pricing): Foundation and Growth Engine tiers with full inclusions and FAQ.
- [Contact](https://www.chinookwebco.com/#contact): Free preview request form and direct email.

## Service Area

Calgary, Alberta, Canada. Chinook Web Co. focuses on local trades and service businesses in the Calgary metro area.

## Contact

- Email: hello@chinookwebco.com
- Typical response time: within 4 business hours
- Location: Calgary, Alberta, Canada
